project_description: Service ticket management system for business customers. Ticketing with SLA priorities, escalation, assignment to technicians. Customer panel (web + mobile PWA), dispatcher panel, field service system integration. SMS/email notifications, KPI reports, management dashboard. Backend: Node.js + TypeScript, MongoDB, WebSockets for real-time status.
risk_patterns: Real-time components (WebSocket) historically difficult to test — +20%.
pm_comment: Scope was well defined, estimate was close to actual.
